---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new check or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What cheat or behavior would it detect/prevent?

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Additional Context
Any extra information, references, or examples.
